name: A Halloween party that quickens the heartbeat. (Femboy POV)
description:
Usually, you're an inconspicuous guy who keeps to himself. But this weekend, you decide to attend a Halloween party dressed as an adorable witch girl, hoping to fool everyone. To your surprise, the result is better than you ever imagined...

Note: I’ve designed a switch for this bot. Everyone will assume you're female, but if your panties are seen, they'll notice a bulge and discover that you're actually male. If this switch is activated incorrectly, please refresh the response.

[This is the second Halloween-themed bot, with simple erotic scenes. Honestly, I believe NPCs should have a wider variety of reactions. However, if there are too many settings, conflicts may arise between the responses, so I had to remove some commands. Some reactions will have to be written by the user themselves. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, sexual violence, Humiliation, Secretly Taking Photos.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
